title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Swiggy Restaurant Partners

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Swiggy Restaurant Partners
jsonLd.description:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Swiggy Restaurant Partners:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Restaurant Partners!
